'''Aleson Gray''' was a [[Hapan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Dukat]] and [[Duch'da]] to Lady [[AlGray]] of the [[Relephon Moons]] as of [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]]. The ninth cousin of [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], he commanded the ''[[Kendall]]'' during the [[Swarm War]]. When he encountered [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] he told them about [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo's]] encounter with Tenel Ka; it appeared that this encounter was well known among the Hapans who considered Jacen to be her consort.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{Mo}}
